title: St. Mary's Church, Marady
tagline: St. Mary's Church, Marady — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: St. Mary's Church, Marady is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Church is a church located in Kurukkunnapuram, East Marady, Muvattupuzha, Kerala, India.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Marady
topPlaces.description: Marady is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Marady Grama Panchayath office is located in South Marady.

topPlaces.name: Perumpalloor
topPlaces.description: Perumpalloor is a village 4 km southeast of Muvattupuzha in Ernakulam, Kerala, India. It is a small area in the Arakuzha panchayat of Muvattupuzha taluk on the banks of the Thodupuzha river.

topPlaces.name: Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Muvattupuzha
topPlaces.description: Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Muvattupuzha is an eparchy of the Syro-Malankara Catholic Church in Muvattupuzha, Kerala, India. The seat of the eparchy is at St.

topPlaces.name: Meenkunnam
topPlaces.description: Meenkunnam is a village with waterfalls, rocky terrains, small hills, and paddy fields. It is located within Arakuzha and Marady Panchayat, Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Thodupuzha River
topPlaces.description: Thodupuzha River has its origins in the Thodupuzha Taluk in the Idukki district of Kerala, India, and is a tributary of the Muvattupuzha river. The river is one of the few in the state that does not become dry in the summer as the outflow from the Idukki hydro-electric project is drained into this river via Kanjar river.

topPlaces.name: Muvattupuzha
topPlaces.description: Muvattupuzha ([muʋɐːt̺ːupuɻɐ]) is a municipality in the Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. It is located 35 km (21.7 mi) east of the district headquarters in Thrikkakara and about 204 km (126.8 mi) north of the state capital Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Central Mahallu Juma Masjid
topPlaces.description: The Central Mahallu Juma Masjid (Hindi: सेंट्रल महल्लु जुमा मस्जिद, मूवाट्टुपुड़ा), also known as Central Mahallu Jama'ath, is a Shafi'i Sunni Friday mosque, located in Muvattupuzha, in the Ernakulam district of the state of Kerala, India. The mosque is located adjacent to the Kavumkara market.

topPlaces.name: Anikkad (Muvattupuzha)
topPlaces.description: Anikkad is a village in Ernakulam district in the state of Kerala, India. It is located near the Muvattupuzha town in Avoly Panchayat.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Church, Marady?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Church, Marady is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Church, Marady?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (28 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (31 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Church, Marady?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Church, Marady at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Church, Marady?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Church, Marady start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Church, Marady?
faq.a: The top attractions are Marady, Perumpalloor, Syro-Malankara Catholic Eparchy of Muvattupuzha, Meenkunnam, Thodupuzha River.
